channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: NTSA Replaces Paper Vehicle Logbooks With Digital Registration
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: NTSA has transitioned to an electronic logbook system integrated with eCitizen and TIMS to reduce fraud and improve service delivery for all Kenyans.
item.content:encoded: NTSA has transitioned to an electronic logbook system integrated with eCitizen and TIMS to reduce fraud and improve service delivery for all Kenyans.

item.title: Nairobi to Adopt Intelligence-Led Policing Model from Tokyo and New York
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The National Police Service is launching a metropolitan pilot program in Nairobi inspired by security strategies used in Tokyo and New York City.
item.content:encoded: The National Police Service is launching a metropolitan pilot program in Nairobi inspired by security strategies used in Tokyo and New York City.

item.title: Football pundits share predictions for upcoming World Cup tournament
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Football experts and BBC pundits weigh in on the expanded World Cup format with France and England emerging as the top title contenders.
item.content:encoded: Football experts and BBC pundits weigh in on the expanded World Cup format with France and England emerging as the top title contenders.

item.title: Why Community Voices Must Shape Kenya's Health Financing Reforms
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Kenya needs to move from top-down health policies to community-led models. Meaningful public participation is key to sustainable healthcare success.
item.content:encoded: Kenya needs to move from top-down health policies to community-led models. Meaningful public participation is key to sustainable healthcare success.

item.title: Champion Majembe Withdraws From Vurugu 2.0 Boxing Tournament
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: Defending boxing champion Majembe has officially withdrawn from the Vurugu 2.0 tournament following a branding dispute with promoter Obinna.
item.content:encoded: Defending boxing champion Majembe has officially withdrawn from the Vurugu 2.0 tournament following a branding dispute with promoter Obinna.

item.title: KURA Announces Partial Road Closures Across Nairobi
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Nairobi motorists face significant traffic disruptions as KURA begins bridge and drainage works on Kenyatta Avenue, Haile Selassie and Ngong Road.
item.content:encoded: Nairobi motorists face significant traffic disruptions as KURA begins bridge and drainage works on Kenyatta Avenue, Haile Selassie and Ngong Road.

item.title: Central Bank of Kenya Maintains Benchmark Interest Rate at 8.75%
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: The Central Bank of Kenya has held its lending rate steady at 8.75 percent amid global economic uncertainty and lowered national GDP growth forecasts.
item.content:encoded: The Central Bank of Kenya has held its lending rate steady at 8.75 percent amid global economic uncertainty and lowered national GDP growth forecasts.

item.title: US intensifies deportation risks for Kenyans over illegal voting
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: New US federal directives increase deportation risks for Kenyans by targeting illegal voting and false citizenship claims alongside immigration violations.
